Cookies.bannerText: This site only uses strictly necessary cookies for operation, authentication and security. No analytics, profiling or advertising cookies are used.
Cookies.modalText: Fidlify currently uses no analytics, marketing or profiling cookies. Only cookies strictly necessary for the Service to work are set.
Cookies.necessaryDescription: Authentication, security (CSRF), session. Required for the Site to work.

hero.title: Loyalty that makes
hero.lede: Create a digital loyalty program for Apple Wallet and Google Wallet, with no app to download.
hero.featureTitle: Apple Wallet · no app · no friction

demoSection.lede: A simple journey, from merchant to customer — in 5 steps.

steps.title: The merchant configures the card.
steps.body: Logo, colors, rewards. No code, no developer needed.

steps.title: The customer scans the QR code.
steps.body: At checkout, on the table or on the receipt. One tap and it is installed.

steps.title: The card is added to Wallet.
steps.body: Apple Wallet or Google Wallet. Always in the customer's pocket.

steps.title: The merchant sends a notification.
steps.body: An offer, a reminder, a new item. Directly on the customer's phone.

steps.title: The customer comes back to buy.
steps.body: The stamp count grows. And they come back again. That's loyalty.

journey.notification: Only 4 coffees left before the 10th is free ☕

scenes.title: A loyalty card.
scenes.sub: Designed to live in your customers' Wallet.

scenes.title: It lands on the phone.
scenes.sub: Apple Wallet or Google Wallet — no app to download.

scenes.title: Always in the pocket.
scenes.sub: Present at every visit, every purchase, every journey.

scenes.title: One notification, one return.
scenes.sub: 94% open rate. The most direct channel to your customers.

items.q: Do my customers need to download an app?
items.a: No. The Fidlify card is installed directly in Apple Wallet or Google Wallet, already available on most modern smartphones.

items.q: Does it work with Apple Wallet AND Google Wallet?
items.a: Yes. Fidlify automatically generates the right version for your customer's device.

items.q: Can I send notifications to my customers?
items.a: Yes. You can send push notifications directly to your customers' Wallet: offers, launches, birthdays and reminders.

items.q: Can I customize the card design?
items.a: Fully. Logo, colors, background image, reward type and copy match your business.

items.q: How long does it take to create a digital loyalty card?
items.a: About 3 minutes. Add your business information, choose the design and reward, and the card is ready to share.

items.q: Is it suited to small Swiss businesses?
items.a: That is exactly why Fidlify exists. Start for free, then upgrade when you need more power.

items.q: Can I use a QR code in-store?
items.a: Yes. Generate it from the dashboard, print it, and customers add the card to Wallet in one tap.

items.q: How much does a digital loyalty program cost with Fidlify?
items.a: There are Gratuit, Essentiel, Croissance and Multi-sites plans. No hidden fees.

footer.description: SaaS loyalty software for local merchants in Switzerland. Digital loyalty cards for Apple Wallet and Google Wallet, with no app to download.

login.title: Log in
login.paidDescription: Log in to finish your subscription
login.verified: Email verified. Log in to access your dashboard.

register.title: Create an account
register.description: Launch your loyalty program in 5 minutes
register.fineprint: By creating an account, you accept our terms of use and privacy policy.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Receive a secure link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.sentBody: If an account exists for {email}, you will receive a reset link in the next few minutes.
forgotPassword.sentHint: Check your spam folder if you do not see it. The link is valid for 24 hours.
forgotPassword.fineprint: For security, we always confirm the send, even if the email is not linked to an account.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.description: Set a new password for your account.
resetPassword.invalidLink: Invalid link — no token provided in the URL.

verifyEmail.missingDescription: This page requires an email parameter. Please restart registration.
verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.spamHint: Check your spam folder if you do not receive the code.

cardRecovery.title: Card recovery
cardRecovery.explain: If {name} lost their card or changed phone, scanning this QR code lets them reinstall it in their Wallet with the current progress preserved.
cardRecovery.printHint: Scan this QR code to reinstall your card in your Wallet.

clientPreview.title: Customer preview — {programName}
clientPreview.openTitle: Open in a new tab (to test on a smartphone)
clientPreview.warning: If you fill out the form here, a real card will be created on your program. Use your own email/phone for a real test, or simply scroll to view the customer interface.

statsInsights.lockedHeatmapDescription: See the peak hours and busiest days of your business. Unlocked from the Essential plan.
statsInsights.lockedCohortDescription: Track whether your January customers are still active in March. Available with a paid plan.
statsInsights.freeHint: Upgrade to Essential or higher to unlock the heatmap and cohort retention.
statsInsights.heatmapSub: Scans per hour × day over the last 30 days
statsInsights.cohortSub: Percentage of customers still active N weeks after signup

join.notFoundBody: This program does not exist or is no longer active.
join.recoveryBody: A recovery email has just been sent to the address provided. Click the link in the email to reinstall your loyalty card in your Wallet — your current progress is preserved.
